---
title: "Protocol Review Sessions"
---

## Strengthen Your Trial Before It Begins

The ACT-CTU offers **Protocol Review Sessions** — a structured, expert-led forum designed to strengthen your clinical trial at a critical stage of development.

These sessions provide investigators with **high-value, real-time feedback** from experienced trialists, methodologists, and clinicians, helping to refine study design, improve feasibility, and enhance competitiveness for funding.

---

## What is a Protocol Review Session?

A Protocol Review Session is a **1-hour live, interactive feedback forum** structured as follows:

- **10-minute presentation** by the Principal Investigator  
  *(background, objectives, study design, protocol, outcomes)*  
- **3–5 key questions** posed by the PI to guide discussion  
- **50-minute expert panel discussion and audience feedback**

Sessions are:
- Moderated by the ACT-CTU  
- Tailored to your study and key challenges  
- Open to the research community  
- Promoted through ACT-CTU communications  

---

## Why Participate?

Protocol Review Sessions provide a unique opportunity to:

- Strengthen your study design before submission  
- Identify methodological and feasibility challenges early  
- Improve grant competitiveness  
- Receive input from **leading clinical trialists and methodologists**  
- Build connections with potential collaborators and long-term partners  
- Contribute to and benefit from a **learning-oriented research community**

---

## Request a Protocol Review Session

If you are developing a clinical trial and would benefit from structured expert feedback, we invite you to request a session.

📧 **[Request a Protocol Review Session](mailto:amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca?subject=Protocol Review Session Request)**

---

## What We Will Need From You

To organize your session, we will ask for:

- A copy of your **latest protocol or research plan**  
- **3–5 key questions** you would like feedback on  
- Your **availability and timeline**

Based on your project and questions, the ACT-CTU will:
- Identify and invite relevant expert panelists  
- Coordinate logistics and promotion  
- Facilitate the session  

---

## Join as a Reviewer or Expert Panelist

We are continuously building a network of experts interested in contributing to protocol development and advancing clinical trial excellence.

If you would like to:
- Serve as a panelist  
- Provide methodological or clinical feedback  
- Engage with emerging trial designs  

📧 **[Express interest in becoming a reviewer](mailto:amanda.lovato@rimuhc.ca?subject=Protocol Review Session Reviewer Opportunity)**

---

## A Collaborative Learning Environment

Beyond supporting individual studies, Protocol Review Sessions are designed to foster a culture of **shared learning, methodological rigor, and collaboration** across the clinical trials community.

---

<div class="section-divider"></div>

## Previous Protocol Review Sessions

| Presenter Photo | Speaker(s) | Date | Trial | Panel |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ![](../images/speakers/pamidi.jpg){width=90} | Sushmita Pamidi | Feb 21, 2024 | RESTful GDM: RESTorative Sleep using a patient-oriented treatment for sleep-disordered breathing in gestational diabetes mellitus (GDM): A randomized controlled trial | Andrea Benedetti; Jonathon Campbell; Simon Bacon; Patricia Li; Julio Flavio Fiore Junior; Marc Beltempo |
| ![](../images/speakers/gagnon.jpg){width=90} | Isabelle Gagnon | Feb 21, 2024 | Direct access physiotherapy in the Pediatric Emergency Department to improve access to and satisfaction with quality care for children and adolescents with musculoskeletal injuries: a randomized control trial | Andrea Benedetti; Jonathon Campbell; Simon Bacon; Patricia Li; Julio Flavio Fiore Junior; Marc Beltempo |
| ![](../images/speakers/janaudis-ferreira.jpg){width=90} | Tania Janaudis-Ferreira | Feb 21, 2024 | Web-based Home Exercise and Educational Program targeting patients with mild COPD: The HELP-MILD Randomized Controlled Trial | Andrea Benedetti; Jonathon Campbell; Simon Bacon; Patricia Li; Julio Flavio Fiore Junior; Marc Beltempo |
| ![](../images/speakers/sadeghi.jpg){width=90} | Nader Sadeghi | Mar 27, 2024 | Neoadjuvant immuno-chemotherapy and de-escalated transoral robotic surgery for HPV-related oropharyngeal cancer | Christina Tsien; Nathaniel Bouganim; Raman Agnihotram; Sameer Parpia |
| ![](../images/speakers/gupta.jpg){width=90} | Indra Gupta | Aug 15, 2024 | Efficacy of Bryophyllum pinnatum tea for kidney stones | Nandini Dendukuri; Rita Suri; Angela Genge |
| ![](../images/speakers/paquette.jpg){width=90} | Caroline Paquette | Aug 15, 2024 | Rewiring the brain to reduce freezing of gait in Parkinson’s disease | Nandini Dendukuri; Rita Suri; Angela Genge |
| ![](../images/speakers/poenaru.jpg){width=90} | Dan Poenaru | Aug 21, 2024 | Virtual reality-based pediatric trauma training feasibility trial | Isabelle Gagnon; Steven Grover; Matthias Friedrich; Dick Menzies |
| ![](../images/speakers/farivar.jpg){width=90} | Reza Farivar | Sep 12, 2024 | Ketogenic enteral feed in severe traumatic brain injury | Deborah Assayag; Simon Ducharme |
| ![](../images/speakers/ben-mrad.jpg){width=90} | Mona Ben M'Rad; Soham Rej; Rita Suri | Dec 5, 2024 | Virtual reality use for exercise in hemodialysis (VIRTUE-HD) | Nancy Mayo; Tina Athanasoulias |
| ![](../images/speakers/magder.jpg){width=90} | Sheldon Magder | Feb 13, 2025 | IV acetaminophen and post-operative delirium following cardiac surgery | Jose Morais; Elham Rahme |
| ![](../images/speakers/kimoff.jpg){width=90} | John Kimoff | Feb 13, 2025 | Positive airway pressure and cardiovascular risk in obstructive sleep apnea | Jose Morais; Elham Rahme |
| ![](../images/speakers/farivar2.jpg){width=90} | Dr. Reza Farivar | Feb 18, 2025 | Reversing amblyopia in children through a participatory framework | Marc Beltempo; Tania Janaudis-Ferreira; Isabelle Gagnon; Isabelle Morin |
| ![](../images/speakers/duque.jpg){width=90} | Dr. Gustavo Duque | Feb 18, 2025 | Effects of HMB and HOBA on aging and intrinsic capacity | Marc Beltempo; Tania Janaudis-Ferreira; Isabelle Gagnon; Isabelle Morin |
| ![](../images/speakers/suri.jpg){width=90} | Rita Suri; Mohamed Elahmedi | Mar 18, 2025 | AI-driven prediction of dialysis blood pressure fluctuations | Remi Goupil; Elaine Kaptein; Emily McDonald; Dan Poenaru |
| ![](../images/speakers/tsui.jpg){width=90} | James Tsui | Apr 24, 2025 | Low-dose radiation for osteoarthritic lumbar inflammation (RELIEF) | Philippe Boileau; Sasha Bernatsky |
| ![](../images/speakers/sharma.jpg){width=90} | Abhinav Sharma | Aug 21, 2025 | Semaglutide in heart failure (Sema-HFrEF feasibility pilot trial) | John Kimoff; Kaberi Dasgupta |
| ![](../images/speakers/pilote.jpg){width=90} | Louise Pilote | March 2026 | Social Prescribing Trial | TBD |
